requirement_topic.en: PSE Mandatory Marking (Electrical Appliances and Materials Safety Act)
requirement_topic.zh: PSE强制标志（电气用品安全法）
requirement_topic.zht: PSE強制標誌（電氣用品安全法）

summary.en: Grid-tied PV inverters (power conditioners / パワーコンディショナ) are classified as Non-Specified Electrical Appliances (その他の電気用品) under Japan's Electrical Appliances and Materials Safety Act (電気用品安全法, Denan). They must bear the PSE circle mark (◯). Manufacturers or importers must register with METI, conduct self-declaration conformity assessment (自己確認) against the applicable technical standards, and maintain technical documentation. Third-party inspection by a registered body (登録検査機関) is NOT required for this category — that requirement applies only to Specified Electrical Appliances (特定電気用品, diamond mark). The product must conform to applicable JIS or equivalent technical standards before sale or distribution in Japan. [NOTE: Classification confirmed as non-specified per METI product interpretation records; the PSE diamond / third-party inspection path does NOT apply to PV power conditioners.]
summary.zh: 并网光伏逆变器（パワーコンディショナ）在日本《电气用品安全法》（Denan）下被列为「其他电气用品（その他の電気用品）」，须标注PSE圆形标志（◯）。制造商或进口商须在经济产业省（METI）登记，依据适用技术标准进行自我声明合格评定（自己確認），并保存技术文件。本类别不要求由注册检查机关（登録検査機関）进行第三方检验——该要求仅适用于「特定电气用品」（菱形标志）。产品在日本销售或流通前须符合适用JIS或等效技术标准。【注：依据METI产品解释记录，分类确认为非特定；PSE菱形/第三方检验路径不适用于光伏用パワーコンディショナ。】
summary.zht: 並網光伏逆變器（パワーコンディショナ）在日本《電氣用品安全法》（Denan）下被列為「其他電氣用品（その他の電気用品）」，須標注PSE圓形標誌（◯）。製造商或進口商須在經濟產業省（METI）登記，依據適用技術標準進行自我聲明合格評定（自己確認），並保存技術文件。本類別不要求由註冊檢查機關（登録検査機関）進行第三方檢驗——該要求僅適用於「特定電氣用品」（菱形標誌）。產品在日本銷售或流通前須符合適用JIS或等效技術標準。【注：依據METI產品解釋記錄，分類確認為非特定；PSE菱形／第三方檢驗路徑不適用於光伏用パワーコンディショナ。】

standards_or_laws: 電気用品安全法 (Denan / Act No. 234 of 1961, as amended)
JIS C 62109-1 (Safety of power converters for use in photovoltaic power systems — Part 1, equivalent to IEC 62109-1)

JIS C 62109-2 (Part 2: Particular requirements for inverters, equivalent to IEC 62109-2:2011; adopted as JIS under Denan Appendix 12 — exact gazette year not publicly confirmed, listed in JEA correspondence table 6th ed. Jan 2024 as current applicable standard)
JIS C 8980 (Residential grid-interactive PV inverters — performance)

summary.en: Chinese PV inverters typically comply with GB/T 37408 (technical requirements for PV inverters) and IEC 62109-1/-2 via the CB Scheme or CQC certification. CE marking (EU) and CQC marks are common on export products. However, neither GB/T 37408, CB certificates, nor CE marks are accepted as substitutes for PSE conformity assessment under Japan's Denan law.
summary.zh: 中国光伏逆变器通常依据GB/T 37408（光伏并网逆变器技术规范）以及通过CB体系或CQC认证取得IEC 62109-1/-2合规证明。出口产品常见CE标志和CQC标志。但GB/T 37408、CB证书及CE标志均不被日本Denan法律的PSE合格评定程序所接受。
summary.zht: 中國光伏逆變器通常依據GB/T 37408（光伏並網逆變器技術規範）以及通過CB體系或CQC認證取得IEC 62109-1/-2合規證明。出口產品常見CE標誌和CQC標誌。但GB/T 37408、CB證書及CE標誌均不被日本Denan法律的PSE合格評定程序所接受。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 37408-2019 (光伏发电并网逆变器技术规范)

gap.en: The core gap is procedural and legal: PSE conformity for PV power conditioners (non-specified category) requires METI business registration and self-declaration conformity assessment — not third-party inspection. CB certificates, CE declarations, and CQC marks are not recognised by METI as substitutes for the self-declaration process. Additionally, JIS C 62109-1 (Japan's adopted equivalent of IEC 62109-1) may contain Japan-specific deviations that require re-testing even where IEC 62109 test data already exists. The distinction from the specified (diamond) route is significant: manufacturers can conduct conformity assessment internally or via a contracted lab without engaging a METI-registered inspection body, but must still meet all JIS technical requirements and maintain records.
gap.zh: 核心差距在于程序与法律层面：光伏用パワーコンディショナ属于「其他电气用品（非特定）」类别，PSE合格评定须在METI登记并进行自我声明——不需要第三方检验机关审查。CB证书、CE声明及CQC标志均不被METI认可为自我声明程序的替代依据。此外，JIS C 62109-1可能含有日本特有偏差，即便已有IEC 62109测试数据，亦可能需要重新测试。与「特定电气用品」（菱形标志）路径的重要区别在于：制造商可在内部或委托合同实验室进行合格评定，无需委托METI注册检查机关，但仍须满足所有JIS技术要求并保存记录。
gap.zht: 核心差距在於程序與法律層面：光伏用パワーコンディショナ屬於「其他電氣用品（非特定）」類別，PSE合格評定須在METI登記並進行自我聲明——不需要第三方檢驗機關審查。CB證書、CE聲明及CQC標誌均不被METI認可為自我聲明程序的替代依據。此外，JIS C 62109-1可能含有日本特有偏差，即便已有IEC 62109測試數據，亦可能需要重新測試。與「特定電氣用品」（菱形標誌）路徑的重要區別在於：製造商可在內部或委託合約實驗室進行合格評定，無需委託METI註冊檢查機關，但仍須滿足所有JIS技術要求並保存記錄。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — statutory requirement before sale in Japan
mandatory_status.cn: Not applicable as export requirement; CB/CQC voluntary for domestic CN market

source.publisher: Ministry of Economy, Trade and Industry (METI), Japan

compliance_verdict.en: A grid-tied PV inverter (power conditioner) manufactured in China targeting the Japanese market must undergo PSE self-declaration conformity assessment, register the business with METI, and affix the PSE circle mark (◯) prior to import or sale. The PSE diamond mark and third-party registered-body inspection are NOT required for this product category — PV power conditioners are confirmed non-specified electrical appliances (その他の電気用品). The applicable technical standards under Denan Appendix 12 include JIS C 62109-1, JIS C 62109-2, and JIS C 8980. Existing CB, CE, or CQC certifications do not fulfil this requirement. [Note: product specifications that fall outside the PV power conditioner sub-category definition should be verified with METI; classification is confirmed for standard grid-tied residential/commercial power conditioners.]
compliance_verdict.zh: 针对日本市场的中国产并网光伏逆变器（パワーコンディショナ），须在进口或销售前完成PSE自我声明合格评定、在METI进行事业登记，并标注PSE圆形标志（◯）。本类产品不需要PSE菱形标志及第三方注册检查机关检验——光伏用パワーコンディショナ已确认属于「其他电气用品（その他の電気用品）」非特定类别。Denan别表第十二下适用技术标准包括JIS C 62109-1、JIS C 62109-2及JIS C 8980。现有CB、CE或CQC认证不能满足此要求。【注：规格超出光伏用パワーコンディショナ子类定义的产品，分类应向METI确认；标准并网住宅/商业用パワーコンディショナ的分类已获确认。】
compliance_verdict.zht: 針對日本市場的中國產並網光伏逆變器（パワーコンディショナ），須在進口或銷售前完成PSE自我聲明合格評定、在METI進行事業登記，並標注PSE圓形標誌（◯）。本類產品不需要PSE菱形標誌及第三方註冊檢查機關檢驗——光伏用パワーコンディショナ已確認屬於「其他電氣用品（その他の電気用品）」非特定類別。Denan別表第十二下適用技術標準包括JIS C 62109-1、JIS C 62109-2及JIS C 8980。現有CB、CE或CQC認證不能滿足此要求。【注：規格超出光伏用パワーコンディショナ子類定義的產品，分類應向METI確認；標準並網住宅／商業用パワーコンディショナ的分類已獲確認。】

requirement_topic.en: Technical Standard Conformity — JIS C 62109 for PV Inverter Safety
requirement_topic.zh: 技术标准合规——光伏逆变器安全JIS C 62109
requirement_topic.zht: 技術標準合規——光伏逆變器安全JIS C 62109

summary.en: Under the Denan framework, PV inverters must conform to the technical standards designated by METI. JIS C 62109-1 (general safety requirements for power converters used in PV systems, equivalent to IEC 62109-1) and JIS C 62109-2 (inverter-specific requirements) are the primary referenced standards. Conformity is demonstrated through testing by a registered inspection body; test reports must follow JIS-specified test methods. METI publishes the official list of applicable technical standards (技術基準) for each product category.
summary.zh: 在Denan框架下，光伏逆变器须符合METI指定的技术标准。JIS C 62109-1（光伏系统用电力变换装置通用安全要求，等同IEC 62109-1）及JIS C 62109-2（逆变器专项要求）为主要参考标准。合规性须通过注册检查机关测试证明；测试报告须遵循JIS规定的测试方法。METI就各产品类别公布适用技术标准（技術基準）的官方清单。
summary.zht: 在Denan框架下，光伏逆變器須符合METI指定的技術標準。JIS C 62109-1（光伏系統用電力變換裝置通用安全要求，等同IEC 62109-1）及JIS C 62109-2（逆變器專項要求）為主要參考標準。合規性須通過註冊檢查機關測試證明；測試報告須遵循JIS規定的測試方法。METI就各產品類別公布適用技術標準（技術基準）的官方清單。

standards_or_laws: JIS C 62109-1 (equivalent to IEC 62109-1:2010, safety of power converters for use in PV power systems — Part 1: General requirements)

JIS C 62109-2 (equivalent to IEC 62109-2:2011, Part 2: Particular requirements for inverters; listed as applicable standard in JEA Denan correspondence table 6th ed. Jan 2024; exact gazette promulgation year not publicly confirmed via open sources)
METI Technical Standards (技術基準) gazette for 電気用品

summary.en: Chinese manufacturers commonly obtain IEC 62109-1/-2 test reports under the CB Scheme from IECEE-accredited Chinese laboratories (e.g., CGC, TUV Rheinland China, CQC). These CB reports are internationally recognised but are not automatically accepted under Japan's PSE system because the registered inspection body must be approved by METI, not merely IECEE-accredited.
summary.zh: 中国制造商通常通过IECEE认可的中国实验室（如CGC、莱茵技术、CQC）取得IEC 62109-1/-2的CB体系测试报告。这些CB报告获国际认可，但并不自动被日本PSE体系接受，原因在于注册检查机关须经METI批准，而非仅凭IECEE认可。
summary.zht: 中國製造商通常通過IECEE認可的中國實驗室（如CGC、萊茵技術、CQC）取得IEC 62109-1/-2的CB體系測試報告。這些CB報告獲國際認可，但並不自動被日本PSE體系接受，原因在於註冊檢查機關須經METI批准，而非僅憑IECEE認可。

gap.en: Even where a Chinese inverter holds a valid IEC 62109 CB certificate, the certificate cannot be directly used for PSE. The applicant must engage a METI-registered inspection body (登録検査機関), which may accept CB test data as reference but will conduct its own review against JIS standards and issue a separate conformity certificate. Any JIS-specific deviations from IEC 62109 must be addressed. This adds cost, time, and a Japan-specific certification step that has no CN-market parallel.
gap.zh: 即使中国逆变器持有有效的IEC 62109 CB证书，该证书亦不能直接用于PSE。申请人须委托METI注册检查机关，后者可将CB测试数据作为参考，但将依据JIS标准进行独立审查并颁发独立合格证书。JIS相对IEC 62109的任何特有偏差须予解决。这增加了成本、时间及一个在中国市场无对应项的日本专项认证步骤。
gap.zht: 即使中國逆變器持有有效的IEC 62109 CB證書，該證書亦不能直接用於PSE。申請人須委託METI註冊檢查機關，後者可將CB測試數據作為參考，但將依據JIS標準進行獨立審查並頒發獨立合格證書。JIS相對IEC 62109的任何特有偏差須予解決。這增加了成本、時間及一個在中國市場無對應項的日本專項認證步驟。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — technical standard conformity is a statutory condition of PSE marking
mandatory_status.cn: IEC 62109 CB certification is voluntary; GB/T 37408 is the mandatory national standard for grid-connected inverters in China

source.publisher: Japanese Industrial Standards Committee (JISC), Ministry of Economy, Trade and Industry

compliance_verdict.en: Conformity to JIS C 62109-1/-2 (or METI-accepted equivalent technical standards under Appendix 12) is required as the technical basis for PSE self-declaration for non-specified PV power conditioners (circle mark). Note: this row's summary text incorrectly references a registered inspection body — that applies to specified products only; PV power conditioners are non-specified and require self-declaration only. CB test reports based on IEC 62109 may serve as internal reference during self-declaration preparation but do not replace the manufacturer's own conformity assessment against JIS standards. The JEA Denan correspondence table (6th ed., Jan 2024) lists JIS C 62109-1 and JIS C 62109-2 as the current applicable standards for this category. [Informational — verify the in-force gazette version with METI before commencing self-declaration]
compliance_verdict.zh: 符合JIS C 62109-1/-2（或别表第十二下METI认可的等效技术标准）是非特定类光伏用パワーコンディショナ（圆形标志）PSE自我声明的技术依据。注：本条目摘要文本错误地提及注册检查机关——该要求仅适用于特定产品；光伏用パワーコンディショナ属非特定类，仅需自我声明。基于IEC 62109的CB测试报告可作为自我声明准备阶段的内部参考，但不能取代制造商自行对照JIS标准进行的合格评定。日本电气协会Denan对应表（第6版，2024年1月）将JIS C 62109-1及JIS C 62109-2列为本类别当前适用标准。[仅供参考——开始自我声明前请向METI核实现行公告版本]
compliance_verdict.zht: 符合JIS C 62109-1/-2（或別表第十二下METI認可的等效技術標準）是非特定類光伏用パワーコンディショナ（圓形標誌）PSE自我聲明的技術依據。注：本條目摘要文本錯誤地提及註冊檢查機關——該要求僅適用於特定產品；光伏用パワーコンディショナ屬非特定類，僅需自我聲明。基於IEC 62109的CB測試報告可作為自我聲明準備階段的內部參考，但不能取代製造商自行對照JIS標準進行的合格評定。日本電氣協會Denan對應表（第6版，2024年1月）將JIS C 62109-1及JIS C 62109-2列為本類別當前適用標準。[僅供參考——開始自我聲明前請向METI核實現行公告版本]

requirement_topic.en: Importer / Notifier Registration Obligation under Denan
requirement_topic.zh: Denan法下进口商/申报人登记义务
requirement_topic.zht: Denan法下進口商/申報人登記義務

summary.en: Any entity importing electrical appliances and materials subject to Denan — including grid-tied PV inverters (classified as Non-Specified Electrical Appliances / その他の電気用品) — into Japan must file a business notification (事業届出) with the competent METI Regional Bureau before commencing import operations. The importer assumes legal responsibility for PSE conformity. Records of conformity assessment and technical documentation must be retained for a prescribed period and made available for METI inspection on request.
summary.zh: 任何向日本进口受Denan法规管的电气用品（含并网光伏逆变器，已分类为「其他电气用品/その他の電気用品」）的主体，须在开始进口业务前向主管METI地区局提交事业申报（事業届出）。进口商承担PSE合规的法律责任。合格评定记录及技术文件须按规定期限保存，并在METI要求时提供检查。
summary.zht: 任何向日本進口受Denan法規管的電氣用品（含並網光伏逆變器，已分類為「其他電氣用品／その他の電気用品」）的主體，須在開始進口業務前向主管METI地區局提交事業申報（事業届出）。進口商承擔PSE合規的法律責任。合格評定記錄及技術文件須按規定期限保存，並在METI要求時提供檢查。

standards_or_laws: 電気用品安全法 Article 3 (事業届出 — business notification obligation)
電気用品安全法 Article 8 (技術基準適合義務 — technical standard conformity obligation)
電気用品安全法 Article 10 (表示義務 — marking obligation)

summary.en: Chinese export compliance does not include a Japan-specific importer registration step. Chinese exporters typically obtain CCC (China Compulsory Certification) for domestic sale and may hold CE, CB, or TUV marks for export. None of these involve registration with a Japanese government authority. A Chinese manufacturer exporting directly to Japan would need to either establish a Japan-registered entity to act as the Denan notifier, or partner with a Japanese importer who files the business notification.
summary.zh: 中国出口合规不包含日本专项进口商登记环节。中国出口商通常取得CCC认证（国内销售）及CE、CB或TUV标志（出口）。上述认证均不涉及向日本政府机构登记。直接向日本出口的中国制造商须在日本注册实体作为Denan申报人，或与日本进口商合作，由后者完成事业申报。
summary.zht: 中國出口合規不包含日本專項進口商登記環節。中國出口商通常取得CCC認證（國內銷售）及CE、CB或TUV標誌（出口）。上述認證均不涉及向日本政府機構登記。直接向日本出口的中國製造商須在日本註冊實體作為Denan申報人，或與日本進口商合作，由後者完成事業申報。

standards_or_laws: CCC (China Compulsory Certification) — applicable to inverters for domestic CN sale
GB 8898 / GB 4943 series (safety standards for applicable product categories)

gap.en: The Denan business notification requirement has no direct CN-side parallel and is invisible to Chinese manufacturers until they attempt Japan market entry. The legal responsibility for PSE compliance shifts to whoever files the business notification in Japan — typically the importer of record. Chinese manufacturers must therefore identify or establish a Japan-side notifier before products can legally enter Japan, creating a structural market-entry barrier beyond the technical testing gap.
gap.zh: Denan事业申报要求在中国侧没有直接对应项，中国制造商在尝试进入日本市场前通常对此毫无察觉。PSE合规的法律责任由在日本提交事业申报的主体承担——通常为记录在案的进口商。因此，中国制造商须在产品合法进入日本之前确定或设立日本侧申报人，这在技术测试差距之外又构成了一个结构性市场准入壁垒。
gap.zht: Denan事業申報要求在中國側沒有直接對應項，中國製造商在嘗試進入日本市場前通常對此毫無察覺。PSE合規的法律責任由在日本提交事業申報的主體承擔——通常為記錄在案的進口商。因此，中國製造商須在產品合法進入日本之前確定或設立日本側申報人，這在技術測試差距之外又構成了一個結構性市場準入壁垒。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — failure to file business notification is a violation of Denan punishable by fine or business suspension
mandatory_status.cn: No equivalent obligation exists for export from China

source.publisher: Ministry of Economy, Trade and Industry (METI), Japan

compliance_verdict.en: Chinese inverter manufacturers or their trading partners must complete a Denan business notification (事業届出) with METI before legally importing into Japan. The notification is filed with the METI Regional Bureau having jurisdiction over the importer's place of business. Conformity assessment inspection records must be retained for 3 years from the date of inspection. This obligation exists independently of PSE technical conformity and is a prerequisite for market entry. The filing entity bears ongoing legal responsibility for product safety compliance. [Informational — verify current filing forms and bureau contact via meti.go.jp/policy/consumer/seian/denan/procedure_03.html before commencing import]
compliance_verdict.zh: 中国逆变器制造商或其贸易伙伴须在合法向日本进口前向METI完成Denan事业申报（事業届出）。申报须向进口商营业所所在地的主管METI地区局提交。合格评定检查记录须自检查之日起保存3年。该义务独立于PSE技术合规要求，是进入市场的前提条件。申报主体持续承担产品安全合规的法律责任。[仅供参考——开始进口前请通过meti.go.jp/policy/consumer/seian/denan/procedure_03.html核实当前申报表格及地区局联系方式]
compliance_verdict.zht: 中國逆變器製造商或其貿易夥伴須在合法向日本進口前向METI完成Denan事業申報（事業届出）。申報須向進口商營業所所在地的主管METI地區局提交。合格評定檢查記錄須自檢查之日起保存3年。該義務獨立於PSE技術合規要求，是進入市場的前提條件。申報主體持續承擔產品安全合規的法律責任。[僅供參考——開始進口前請通過meti.go.jp/policy/consumer/seian/denan/procedure_03.html核實當前申報表格及地區局聯繫方式]
